MarkdownEditor.clearConfirm: Delete all content? This action cannot be undone.
MarkdownEditor.importConfirm: Current content will be replaced. Import file?
MarkdownEditor.noPermission: You do not have permission to view this page.
MarkdownEditor.resetSettingsConfirm: Reset all settings to default values?
MarkdownEditor.plantumlExternalWarning: PlantUML diagrams are rendered by sending code to an external server (plantuml.com). Your diagram code will be transmitted over the internet.
MarkdownEditor.versionDescription: A markdown editor with real-time preview, diagram support (Mermaid, PlantUML), and rich editing features.
MarkdownEditor.versionTech: Built with Next.js, TipTap, Mermaid, PlantUML, Material UI featuring Claude Code
MarkdownEditor.helpBasicOpsDesc: The editor supports two modes and various file operations.
MarkdownEditor.helpBasicOpsWysiwyg: Edit mode: Edit with rich-text formatting and real-time preview.
MarkdownEditor.helpBasicOpsSource: Source mode: Edit raw Markdown directly. Switch via the View menu.
MarkdownEditor.helpBasicOpsFile: File operations: Copy, Download (.md), Import (.md), and Clear from the toolbar.
MarkdownEditor.helpTextDecorationDesc: Apply formatting to selected text using the toolbar or bubble menu.
MarkdownEditor.helpTextDecorationBubble: Select text to show the bubble menu: Bold, Italic, Underline, Strikethrough, Highlight, Inline Code, Link.
MarkdownEditor.helpTextDecorationToolbar: You can also use the toolbar buttons or keyboard shortcuts for text formatting.
MarkdownEditor.helpBlocksDesc: Insert block-level elements via the toolbar or keyboard shortcuts.
MarkdownEditor.helpBlocksHeading: Headings: H1 through H5 are available.
MarkdownEditor.helpBlocksList: Lists: Bullet list, Ordered list, and Task list (with checkboxes).
MarkdownEditor.helpBlocksQuote: Blockquote: Indent text as a quotation.
MarkdownEditor.helpBlocksCode: Code Block: Insert a fenced code block with optional language syntax highlighting.
MarkdownEditor.helpBlocksHr: Horizontal Rule: Insert a divider line.
MarkdownEditor.helpMarginMenuDesc: Click the label (H1, H2, P, UL, OL, Task, Quote) shown at the left margin of each block to open a menu for changing the block type (heading level, paragraph, list, blockquote).
MarkdownEditor.helpTableDesc: Insert and edit tables using the toolbar and in-table controls.
MarkdownEditor.helpTableInsert: Insert a table from the toolbar button.
MarkdownEditor.helpTableEdit: Add/remove columns and rows, set cell alignment (left/center/right) via the floating table toolbar.
MarkdownEditor.helpTableMove: Move rows up/down and columns left/right using the move buttons.
MarkdownEditor.helpTableNav: Navigate cells with Tab (next cell) and Shift+Tab (previous cell).
MarkdownEditor.helpTableFullscreen: Expand the table to fullscreen mode for easier editing of large tables.
MarkdownEditor.helpMermaidDesc: Create diagrams using Mermaid syntax in a code block.
MarkdownEditor.helpMermaidTypes: Supported diagram types: Flowchart, Sequence, Class, ER, State Machine, Gantt, Mindmap, Git Graph, and more.
MarkdownEditor.helpMermaidSamples: Insert diagram samples from the toolbar to get started quickly.
MarkdownEditor.helpMermaidTools: Use the floating toolbar for node/edge/participant insertion helpers.
MarkdownEditor.helpMermaidZoom: Zoom in/out and pan the rendered diagram. Use fullscreen mode for larger diagrams.
MarkdownEditor.helpPlantUmlDesc: Create diagrams using PlantUML syntax in a code block.
MarkdownEditor.helpPlantUmlTypes: Supported diagram types: Sequence, Class, Use Case, Activity, State, Component, Deployment, ER, and more.
MarkdownEditor.helpPlantUmlExternal: PlantUML diagrams are rendered via an external server (plantuml.com). You will be asked for consent before sending diagram code.
MarkdownEditor.helpPlantUmlSamples: Insert predefined samples from the floating toolbar to get started.
MarkdownEditor.helpPlantUmlTools: Use the floating toolbar for arrows, participants, classes, and other element insertion helpers.
MarkdownEditor.helpSearchDesc: Find and replace text within the editor.
MarkdownEditor.helpSearchOpen: Open the search bar from the toolbar or with the keyboard shortcut.
MarkdownEditor.helpSearchOptions: Options: Match Case, Match Whole Word, Use Regular Expression.
MarkdownEditor.helpSearchFullscreen: Search also works within fullscreen code editor and table views.
MarkdownEditor.helpOutlineDesc: View the document structure and navigate between sections.
MarkdownEditor.helpOutlineJump: Click a heading in the outline to jump to that position in the editor.
MarkdownEditor.helpOutlineFold: Fold/unfold sections to collapse or expand content under headings.
MarkdownEditor.helpOutlineMove: Reorder sections by drag-and-drop or up/down move buttons.
MarkdownEditor.helpOutlineResize: Drag the panel border to resize the outline panel width.
MarkdownEditor.helpSettingsDesc: Customize the editor appearance and behavior.
MarkdownEditor.helpSettingsItems: Adjustable settings: Line Height, Font Size, Table Width, Editor Min Width, Editor Background Color.
MarkdownEditor.helpShortcutsDesc: Use keyboard shortcuts for faster editing. The following shortcuts are available:
MarkdownEditor.helpImageDndDesc: Insert images and import Markdown files by various methods.
MarkdownEditor.helpImageDndUrl: Insert an image by specifying a URL via the toolbar button.
MarkdownEditor.helpImageDndDrop: Drag and drop image files directly into the editor.
MarkdownEditor.helpImageDndPaste: Paste images from the clipboard (Ctrl+V / Cmd+V).
MarkdownEditor.helpImageDndImport: Drag and drop a .md file into the editor to import its content.
MarkdownEditor.fileApiNotSupported: This browser does not support direct file access. Use Upload/Download instead.
MarkdownEditor.saveFileNoHandle: Open a file first to use Save
MarkdownEditor.encodingChangeConfirm: Change encoding to {encoding}? Some characters may not display correctly.

Landing.heroDescription: A free, open-source markdown editor that works entirely in your browser. No sign-up, no server — your words stay yours.
Landing.featureWysiwygDesc: Write with rich formatting that instantly renders as you type. Bold, italic, links, images — all at your fingertips.
Landing.featureSourceDesc: Switch to raw Markdown editing with syntax highlighting. Full control over your document structure.
Landing.featureDiffDesc: Open two documents side by side, compare differences, and merge changes with a single click.
Landing.featureDiagramDesc: Create flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ER diagrams, and more with Mermaid and PlantUML support.
Landing.featurePdfDesc: Export your documents as beautifully formatted PDFs, ready for sharing or printing.
Landing.featurePwaDesc: Install as a progressive web app. Edit your documents anytime, anywhere — no internet required.
Landing.featureCommentDesc: Browse your document in read-only review mode. Add comments and toggle checkboxes without accidentally editing content.
Landing.featureOutlineDesc: Navigate your document structure at a glance. Jump to any heading instantly with the sidebar outline panel.
Landing.featureSlashDesc: Type / to quickly insert tables, code blocks, diagrams, and more — no need to remember toolbar locations.
Landing.featuresDescription: Explore all the features of Anytime Markdown
Landing.experimentalNotice: This site is an experimental project where all design, implementation, and testing are performed by Claude Code, an AI coding assistant — humans provide only instructions. Anytime Markdown itself is used to review specifications and verify test plans during development. Source code is available on <github>GitHub</github>.
